title: Analyst lists five upgrades coming to the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max
summary: GF Securities analyst Jeff Pu has come out with a new research note, and in it he's outlined five upgrades coming to the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max later this year. First, the Dynamic Island will be smaller, since the flood illuminator used for Face ID will be moved under the display. Next…
